tools.name: list_services
tools.description: Get a list of all services we provide. Use when the customer asks what services are available, what you can book, or similar.

tools.name: call_out_fee
tools.description: Get the call-out fee that applies to bookings. Use when the customer asks about the call-out fee, booking fee, or upfront cost for a booking.

tools.name: service-estimate-card
tools.description: Service estimate summary card with external action link.
